name: Unijunction Transistor
shortDescription: A Unijunction Transistor (UJT) (unijunction transistor) is a three-terminal device with one emitter and two bases, used mainly as a relaxation oscillator and trigger.
whatIsIt: A UJT (unijunction transistor) is a three-terminal device with one emitter and two bases, used mainly as a relaxation oscillator and trigger.
whyExists: UJTs provide a simple, stable way to generate timing pulses and trigger thyristors.
whereUsed: They are used in oscillator circuits, timers, and Silicon Controlled Rectifier (SCR)/Triode for Alternating Current (TRIAC) trigger generators.
